\section{Full Reliability \texttimes{} Recoverability Surface}
\label{app:surface}

Tables~\ref{tab:surface-auc} and~\ref{tab:surface-delta} report the complete
$5 \times 5$ grid underlying the surface visualised in \cref{fig:c0-surface}
(see \cref{sec:exp-surface} for experimental setup).
Each cell aggregates $n = 360$ C0-score predictions.
Confidence intervals are 2\,000-sample percentile bootstrap (95\,\%).
Significance markers in Table~\ref{tab:surface-delta}:
$\bigstar$~=~CI entirely above zero (enhancement reliably helps);
$\dagger$~=~CI entirely below zero (enhancement hurts);
\text{n.s.}~=~CI crosses zero.
Source: \texttt{project/results/c0\_decision\_surface.csv}.
